candidate.label: Axiom Clean R012
changeSummary: Global side-width default normalization from 135% to 100%.

project.nextAction: Review the persistent width-control repeatability failure and decide whether to investigate the managed-host capture variance or pause R012 before listening eligibility.

statusDefinitions.active_unqualified_listening_candidate: Candidate exists for evaluation but is not qualified, listening-accepted, promoted, or accepted.
statusDefinitions.passed: The named static validation completed successfully.
statusDefinitions.complete: The named planning deliverable is present and internally validated; execution approval may still be required.
statusDefinitions.pending: Required work or decision has not been completed.
statusDefinitions.not_approved: The owner has not authorized this transition.
statusDefinitions.requires_investigation: Technical evidence found a repeatable concern or material limitation that must be resolved before listening eligibility.
statusDefinitions.inactive: No Labs experiment is currently active.
